历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Science was approximately 4618 → 4610 → 4511. Over the past three years, the ranking has been relatively stable within the 4500–4620 range, with a baseline of about 4511 in 2025 and small overall fluctuation. The provincial Science enrollment plan was 9 students in 2023, 8 in 2024, and 7 in 2025, showing a decreasing trend year by year. In 2026, the plan is 6 students, a reduction of 1 student (-14%) compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition and puts upward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it was approximately 81st in 2026, slightly up from 82nd in 2025, with a stable upward trend in recent years. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed (air conditioning fee controversy, a neutral incident). On Douyin, its overall popularity ranks 49th (relatively hot). In 2022, there was a negative incident related to teacher ethics, but it has subsided in recent years. No obvious enrollment gaps or discontinuities have been observed. Foreign Language and Literature is rated A+ (top nationally), highly correlated with its enrollment majors such as English, Translation, and Journalism & Communication, making it strongly attractive to language-oriented students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of foreign language majors is generally cooling down, but SISU, as a top foreign language institution, still maintains brand appeal. In 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is about 238,000 (in 2025, liberal arts + science totaled about 76,500), a significant increase, intensifying competition. In 2025, the first batch cutoff for Science was 421 points, with little fluctuation in recent years. Shanghai International Studies University is located in Shanghai, which is an inter-provincial application for Xinjiang students, and eastern coastal cities have relatively strong regional appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 Science enrollment plan (-14%), the significant increase in the total number of examinees in the province, and the stable upward trend in the university's ranking, along with intensified competition due to the expanded examinee pool, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4154, with a range of 3654–4654.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Journalism and Communication (Outstanding International Journalism and Communication Talent Program)
- Translation (Multiple Directions)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Spanish
- Management Science and Engineering (Enrolled in 2024, not listed for 2026)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 3654–4654, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main target, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<3654), you can prioritize competitive majors like Law and English. If your ranking is close to the upper limit (>4654), it is advisable to focus on Tier 3 small language majors.
